prior_art_hit_table.title: System and method for monitoring an integrated system
prior_art_hit_table.assignee_or_authors: BL Technologies Inc; Vijaysai Prasad et al.
prior_art_hit_table.disclosed_capabilities: Water purification monitoring with soft sensing, estimator, predictor, supervisory control and integrated treatment units.
prior_art_hit_table.missing_project_elements: No node-modality sparse sensing contract, no low-frequency cyclic evidence window, and no replay/operator/release-gate sequence for writeback.

claim_element_comparison_chart.project_element_text: Project combines sparse observation, soft-sensor grey-state estimation, cyclic hold/recycle time buffer and evidence-gated release control.
claim_element_comparison_chart.prior_art_disclosure_text: Reference describes real-time parameter estimation, present-state comparison, event prediction and supervisory execution for water purification components.
claim_element_comparison_chart.missing_or_distinguishing_detail: Reference is broader integrated monitoring/control; it does not expose the project's state-level external evidence package, focused catalyst response gate or replay/release boundary.
claim_element_comparison_chart.fallback_claim_scope_impact: keep narrow technical scope pending human comparison review
claim_element_comparison_chart.field_validation_gate_to_preserve: field replay, operator review and release gate

fallback_claim_scope_recommendation.decision_rationale: preliminary external source shows partial overlap but not the full system chain
fallback_claim_scope_recommendation.preserved_field_validation_gate: field replay, operator review and release gate

prior_art_hit_table.title: Multi-agent artificial intelligence designs novel catalysts for ultrafast water purification
prior_art_hit_table.assignee_or_authors: Yao Pan, Junxi Guo, Yizhan Huang et al.
prior_art_hit_table.disclosed_capabilities: Multi-agent AI, expert-validated knowledge graphs and catalyst evaluation for water purification material discovery.
prior_art_hit_table.missing_project_elements: No operational low-cost catalyst-activity proxy holdout, no cyclic treatment action policy, and no actuator/release no-write gate.

claim_element_comparison_chart.project_element_text: Project treats catalyst activity as an operational hidden state estimated from low-cost proxy signals and blocked from control relaxation until field holdout evidence exists.
claim_element_comparison_chart.prior_art_disclosure_text: Reference presents multi-agent AI for PMS-activating catalyst design and water-purification performance validation.
claim_element_comparison_chart.missing_or_distinguishing_detail: Reference is primarily material discovery; it does not disclose the project's low-cost sensor-cycle-control guardrail and field response merge path.
claim_element_comparison_chart.fallback_claim_scope_impact: keep narrow technical scope pending human comparison review
